query: SELECT COUNT(*) as total, SUM(CASE WHEN guestSessionId IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as guestItems, SUM(CASE WHEN userId IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as userItems FROM wardrobeItems;
